feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting trouble when using TUNNEL Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA on-premise
entry.content:
Hi experts, wish you all a productive working day,
I've created a TUNNEL Live Connection from SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to my SAP HANA on-premise. In the SAP Cloud Connector (SCC), I successfully created a Subaccount to connect from my SCC to my SAC.


Then I successfully created a Cloud to-on-premise to connect from SCC to SAP HANA.

After that, I go to SAC to create a Live Tunnel Connection to the SAP HANA but I got the error: You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role.

Then I went to the https://<SAC_tenant>/lcs/scc/tunnel/TUNNEL/sap/bc/ina/service/v2/GetServerInfo and got this error:

 

However, I have already granted InA privilege to the account under my SAP HANA system.

My company infrastructure:
Internet --> Company Domain(Gateway) --> Cloud Connector (inside SAP HANA on-premise server)


Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: how to delete a solution from prod system C4C sdk
entry.content: I want to delete a solution in the production system on c4c sdk but I can't delete it. How can I delete it? Delete button is inactive 😞

entry.title: Versioning in Analytic Data Model (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I wanted to ask you if had a similar case or maybe you interpret guidence differently. 

I created an Analytic Data Model with Layout Measure in SAC. 

I created necessary dimensions, measures, calculations etc. 

One of the dimensions is Version. I defined this dimension, created relevant categories like Actual, Planning and Forecast. 

When the Data Model was completed, I decided to load the data via import from a file. 

I set up the import and I started preparing the data - according to documentation from SAP portal (Import and Prepare Fact Data for a Model with Measures | SAP Help Portal) I created Cateogry attribute which is relevant.

The next step was "Map to FACTS". 
I noticed that the Version was automatically mapped to default value - Actual. I removed this assignment becasue I had Version defined in file which was imported so I finished mapping - everything finished successfully. 

In step "Map properties" I was asked for Category assignment - I did it according to documentation from SAP portal. 

This step was successfull as well.

The last step was validation before Import the data.
I received this notification:

I went back to Mapping dimensions to Facts and removed mapping of the version. I assigned "default value" and I tried to validate once again. 

It worked without any notification. 

Can I understand that I cannot have more versions defined in Analytic Data Model even for Reporting purposes when I do not need planning activities? 

Perhaps I am doing something wrong that everything is fine until validation process. 
Have you had similar case? 

Versioning is very useful due to the calculations options available in the Story. Without that these options are not accessible.
I followed the information available on the SAP portal (link I shared above) but for me it's a bit misleading. 
In restriction section it's written that "There is only one Actuals in the model" and in the guide below it's mentioned that if we have multiple versions in the dataset we can assign these rows to multiple versions.

 

I would be grateful for your feedback.
Best regards,
Artur

entry.title: How to implement additional booking periods (More than 12) in SAC and Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are currently working on a reporting using SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere with data coming from S/4HANA. 

In S/4HANA it is possible to work with additional booking periods (More than the typical 12 month booking periods). We have the requirement to report these additional booking periods using SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere. As there is barely any information or blogs regarding this and no standard solution available in SAC/Datasphere, we were wondering if someone worked on a similar solution before or if there are any best practices for this kind of implementation.

Any help is much appreciated!

Best regards

entry.title: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a generic id in the Tunnel Live connection to S/4. But the requirement now is to implement S4 roles in SAC, so that any user with a company code access should see only that company code data in SAC.

How we can implement this requirement.

Thanks,

entry.title: Clear Facts & Classic Story BUG
entry.content:
Hi team, i may have found an bug.
I am using SAP Analytics Cloud, and i am creating an model and a Story.
When i saw i had the wrong data on the model, i cleared the data that i had there, and then imported an new excel in there, but when i got to the story the old data was still there, so i tried to clear data again, and check if the story was empty with data, but it wasnt, it still had all the information from the old excel.

Does anyone recognize this problem?

Best Regards, Bernardo Santos

entry.title: DataAction Calculation
entry.content:
I have these data in a planning version that were copied from an Actual and Forecast version. I’m able to copy them correctly, but I have a dataAction that is supposed to calculate the percentage of the "Percentagem VB" measure, which should act on the VB value.
This is the formula I’m using:


MEMBERSET [d/Date] = (%TargetMonth%)
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB", [d/Date] = %SourceMonth%, [d/Version] = %SourceVersion%) * (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "perce_aumento_VB", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = "202401") + 1)

 

The calculation works for certain "Recs," but there are others that do not change, and I don’t know why. Can someone help?

entry.title: Calendar Task Status
entry.content:
I am trying to retrieve the calendar tasks and adding them into a public dimension table to later on display in a story. I am facing an issue when adding the Status. Any suggestions? 

Also trying casting it but still the same issue

Code used below:

var id1 = CalendarIntegration_1.getCalendarEventById('6CA025801922715B2FCA12A37C6CE664').getId();
var description1 = CalendarIntegration_1.getCalendarEventById('6CA025801922715B2FCA12A37C6CE664').getDescription();
var desc1 = CalendarIntegration_1.getCalendarEventById('6CA025801922715B2FCA12A37C6CE664').getName();
var stat1 = CalendarIntegration_1.getCalendarEventById('6CA025801922715B2FCA12A37C6CE664').getStatus();
var strstat1 = cast(Type.string, stat1);
var member1 = cast(Type.PlanningModelMember,{id:id1, description: description1, properties:{TechnicalID: id1, Desc: desc1, Status: stat1}});
var result1 = PlanningModel_1.createMembers("Task", member1);

entry.title: SAC - how to trigger my input parameter to run the model prompt on that input.
entry.content:
In my SAC story, I am using 5 models from Datasphere. 4 of them have a date prompt and they are linked (all of them use the same format e.g 202410). so when i run the prompt for one model all models run on the same prompt. But the 5th model is using a input parameter for Date.
So when the user selects the Date from the input parameter(month year), i want it to automatically trigger the other 4 models to refresh at that date. How do I do that?

entry.title: Refresh input control when story filter/variable is changed
entry.content:
I have a SAC optimized story with several pages. When i'm changing the story variable/filter on the FilterPanel, the change is not reflected in my input control.

For example if for the current story filter (default model variable) there is no data for the table in page 5, the input control in page 5 will be blank (inactive values). But when I change the story filter to a correct value, data appears in the table, but the input control still shows blank/inactive values.

Is there a way to refresh the input control similar to how the table is being refresh when a filter is changed at story level?

entry.title: In SAC Data Wrangler, can I generate multiple rows of data based on start and end date records?
entry.content: Can I do this in SAC Data Wrangler and load into fact table of a model?

entry.title: Need Organization chart in SAC to display the organizational structure
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to add a chart to the SAC dashboard to present the company organ chart. I have attached a screenshot below for your reference.

I tried to do this with standard available charts but its not helpful.

entry.title: Story usage by user
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to find out which users have opened a particular story which often. I looked around in the statistic stories but could not find this information anywhere.

Is it possible to see that?

Thanks!

entry.title: Calculations in a specific planning version
entry.content:
Good morning,
I am creating a story where I am copying data from the actual version to the planning version. When the data is copied to planning, it increases the gross salary calculation based on parameters. These parameters are associated with January 2024, and in the Data Action, the calculation is also linked to January 2024.

I have one button for copying and another button for the calculation. However, when I execute the calculation, it does not work. Could you assist me in resolving this issue?

I will send screenshots to provide more context to the question.

The purpose of the table is that in January 2025, a 50% increase is applied to "Rec1," meaning it should have 1,200 euros plus 50%.

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Tenant and domain in SAP Analytic Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question about SAP Analytics Cloud versions. For one client, I have the information summarized in the attached screenshot "ClientWithDifferentTenant.png," where the SAC tenant has the following domain: "https://******q.eu10.analytics.cloud.sap" Meanwhile, for most other clients, I have the configuration shown in the screenshot "ClientHCSTenant.png," and the tenant has the following domain: "https://******.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap"

Could you please explain the difference between these two SAC versions? Are there any limitations associated with the "analytics.cloud" tenant?

Thanks

Dino

entry.title: How can I consume CDS View I_AccountingDocumentType in SAC, which steps are necessary?
entry.content:
I currently have a connection between SAC and S4 HANA and I'm trying to read the CDS View  I_AccountingDocumentType , it can be seen in system but its not available in SAC. What steps should I take? Is it by default not available?

Thanks

entry.title: Table Bugging dimensions
entry.content:
Hello team,

I have a planning model with two dimensions: "Resources" and "Departments."
There are 5 departments, each with specific resources, as shown in the first image.

The issue is that when I add a new table, it creates duplicate "Resources" without any values in others departments. This disrupts one of our functionalities, preventing us from continuing with the project. I don’t understand why new "Resources" are being generated every time a new table is added.

I’ll provide an example of the "Resources" being created by the table, but this is just one case – the table often creates new resources for other departments randomly, with null values. Meanwhile, the original "Resource" with values remains in the correct department.
Inside the model, the resources are being created multiple times in other departments too, and the original still remains in the original department

Thanks for all the help, have a nice day

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-In Add Rows/Columns Overwriting Formulas
entry.content:
I am trying to utilize the 'Add Rows/Columns' feature in the SAP Analytics Cloud excel add-in but have an issue where the table rewrites my formula. Please see below for example:

I create the column and attempt to subtract BUD from Actual:

After hitting enter the system the table refreshes and replaces my formula with a new (and quite useless) new formula.  For some reason it changed what I had original referenced (C7) with a new cell (D7):

I have tried checking and unchecking the Optimized Planning Area and Planning Enabled features but the same problem still persists.  Any help is appreciated!

entry.title: SAP Integrated Planning usage in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

In my customer landscape SAP BW 7.5 on HANA DB used extensively for Integrated planning application using the BEx queries.

We plan to move on to SAP Analytics Cloud platform, we would like to utilize all the back-end developments in SAP GUI like Aggregation, planning sequences.

Is that possible from SAC?

Best Regards,

Vasanth

entry.title: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a story based on top of SAC live connection model and story is displaying with blank when we open and tried at query designer for the same combinations, and it is failing due to memory issue. is there any specific setting to increase/update for memory? Attached the error screenshot for the same.

 



Thanks.
